parameters.query: SELECT id, name, max_guests, rooms, base_price, COALESCE(description,'') AS description FROM apartments WHERE active = TRUE ORDER BY id;

SELECT apartment_id,   to_char(checkin_at,'YYYY-MM-DD')  AS checkin_at,   to_char(checkout_at,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS checkout_at,   status, source, COALESCE(notes,'') AS notes FROM bookings WHERE checkout_at >= CURRENT_DATE   AND checkin_at  <= CURRENT_DATE + INTERVAL '90 days'   AND status IN ('confirmed','booking') ORDER BY apartment_id, checkin_at;

SELECT gw.apartment_id, a.name AS apartment_name,
       to_char(gw.gap_start,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS gap_start,
       to_char(gw.gap_end,'YYYY-MM-DD')   AS gap_end,
       gw.nights, gw.estimated_loss, gw.recommendation
FROM gap_windows gw
JOIN apartments a ON a.id = gw.apartment_id
WHERE gw.status = 'open'
  AND gw.gap_start >= CURRENT_DATE
ORDER BY gw.estimated_loss DESC NULLS LAST, gw.gap_start
